mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT038#SQL001 */ NAME FROM M_CODE WHERE START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND CODE_TYPE = '45' AND CODE_1 = #{fct038Sql001RequestModel.screenId} AND CODE_2 = #{fct038Sql001RequestModel.userPriv}
